app.name: Easy Calorie Tracker
app.description: A simple and powerful tool to track your daily calorie intake and maintain a healthy lifestyle.

features.title: Easy Tracking
features.description: Log your meals and snacks in seconds with our intuitive interface.

features.title: Daily Goals
features.description: Set and monitor your daily calorie goals to stay on track with your fitness journey.

features.title: History & Progress
features.description: View your history and track your progress over days, weeks, and months.

features.title: Offline Access
features.description: All your data is stored locally on your device, allowing you to use the app anywhere.

features.title: Privacy First
features.description: Your data stays on your device. We don't collect your personal information.

features.title: Completely Free
features.description: Enjoy all core features without any hidden costs or subscriptions.

support.title: Email Support
support.description: Have questions or feedback? Contact us via email.

support.title: GitHub
support.description: Check out our open-source presence or report issues.

faq.question: How is my data stored?
faq.answer: All your data is stored locally on your device's internal storage. This ensures maximum privacy and offline availability.

faq.question: Does the app require an internet connection?
faq.answer: No, the core features of tracking meals and calories work entirely offline.

faq.question: Can I export my data?
faq.answer: Currently, data export is planned for a future update. Stay tuned!
